creator: home@aucampelectronics.co.za
text:
Please remove me from mail received from:

owner-freebsd-i386@freebsd.org [mailto:owner-freebsd-i386@freebsd.org]  On Behalf Of FreeBSD Tinderbox mail. 

linimon@FreeBSD.org; 
freebsd-i386@FreeBSD.org; 
freebsd-bugs@FreeBSD.org
owner-freebsd-i386@freebsd.org; on behalf of; 
kevin [kevinxlinuz@163.com]

ETC.

I have tried but it doesnt stop mailing me but To unsubscribe, send any mail to freebsd-i386-unsubscribe@freebsd.org does not work!

Thx
Pierre

Fix: 

Remove me from all mailing lists (home@aucampelectronics.co.za)
